---
# nowcloud.pl: Azure Platform Architecture

## Site summary

nowcloud.pl is the professional architecture blog of Kamil Lygas. It provides practical guidance on governed Azure platforms for enterprise product teams and regulated workloads, with emphasis on landing zones, sovereignty, networking, identity, Azure Virtual Desktop and infrastructure as code.

Canonical URL: https://nowcloud.pl/

## Author

Kamil Lygas is a Senior Enterprise Architect Manager and Azure platform architect with experience in Azure, Microsoft 365 and Citrix Cloud. His focus includes global multi-tenant Azure platforms, regulated landing zones, secure cloud governance, platform engineering and repeatable delivery through infrastructure as code.

Canonical author page: https://nowcloud.pl/author/kamil-lygas/

## Core pages

- Home: https://nowcloud.pl/ - Positioning, featured topics and latest Azure architecture articles.
- About: https://nowcloud.pl/about/ - Professional background, architecture focus and certifications.
- Azure Landing Zones: https://nowcloud.pl/azure-landing-zones/ - Governed foundations, subscription design, policy and platform operations.
- Sovereign Cloud: https://nowcloud.pl/sovereign-cloud/ - Control boundaries, regulated environments, evidence and recovery.
- Azure Virtual Desktop: https://nowcloud.pl/azure-virtual-desktop/ - Secure enterprise desktop platform design and operations.
- Azure Networking: https://nowcloud.pl/azure-networking/ - Connectivity, private endpoints and Private DNS at scale.
- Identity & Security: https://nowcloud.pl/identity-security/ - Microsoft Entra ID, privileged access and platform security controls.
- Infrastructure as Code: https://nowcloud.pl/infrastructure-as-code/ - Terraform, policy-as-code and repeatable delivery.
- Platform Engineering: https://nowcloud.pl/platform-engineering/ - Governed self-service for Azure product teams.
- Topics: https://nowcloud.pl/topics/ - Topic index and recommended reading.
- Contact: https://nowcloud.pl/contact/ - LinkedIn and GitHub contact routes.

## Important articles

### Designing Azure Landing Zones for Product Teams

Canonical URL: https://nowcloud.pl/azure/landing-zones/2026/05/25/designing-azure-landing-zones-for-product-teams.html

Explains how landing zones should operate as a platform product: management group and subscription boundaries, subscription vending, network and DNS baseline, identity, policy, observability and product-team onboarding.

### Private Endpoints Need Private DNS Zones

Canonical URL: https://nowcloud.pl/azure/networking/2026/05/26/private-endpoints-need-private-dns-zones.html

Explains why a Private Endpoint is incomplete without the correct Azure Private DNS zone, VNet link or resolver path, with an implementation and troubleshooting pattern for landing zones.

### Private DNS at Scale in Azure Landing Zones

Canonical URL: https://nowcloud.pl/azure/networking/2026/05/29/private-dns-at-scale-in-azure-landing-zones.html

Explains why Private DNS becomes a central platform capability as private endpoints grow across subscriptions and networks, including central zones, Azure DNS Private Resolver, hybrid forwarding, ownership and failure modes.

### Azure Files SMB Multichannel: Performance, Requirements and Configuration

Canonical URL: https://nowcloud.pl/azure/storage/2021/06/04/ConfigureAZStorageSMBMulti.html

Describes performance and configuration considerations for Azure Files SMB Multichannel, including network prerequisites, private endpoints, verification and operational troubleshooting.

### Universal Print: Cloud Print Management for Microsoft 365 Environments

Canonical URL: https://nowcloud.pl/microsoft%20365/2021/06/04/UniversalPrint.html

Describes cloud-managed printing architecture, Microsoft Entra ID group assignment, printer onboarding, Intune considerations and operational governance for hybrid and Azure Virtual Desktop use cases.

### Enable Continuous Access Evaluation in Microsoft Entra ID

Canonical URL: https://nowcloud.pl/azure/identity/2021/06/05/ContinuosAccessEvaluation.html

Explains how Continuous Access Evaluation complements Conditional Access by responding more quickly to critical identity events and session revocation scenarios.

### Configuring Infrastructure using Ansible

Canonical URL: https://nowcloud.pl/azure/automation/2023/03/26/Ansible.html

Documents practical configuration automation following Terraform provisioning for Azure-hosted Windows infrastructure.

### Building Tuck Shop application using Microsoft Power Apps

Canonical URL: https://nowcloud.pl/power%20platform/2023/03/25/TuckShop.html

Provides a practical low-code example using Microsoft Power Apps, SharePoint and Teams for an internal ordering scenario.

## Discovery

- Sitemap: https://nowcloud.pl/sitemap.xml
- Feed: https://nowcloud.pl/feed.xml
- Robots: https://nowcloud.pl/robots.txt
- Concise AI discovery index: https://nowcloud.pl/llms.txt

This public content is intended for indexing, technical discovery, summarisation and citation.
